nasb.text: For how can I endure to see the calamity which will befall my people, and how can I endure to see the destruction of my kindred?”

esv.text: For how can I bear to see the calamity that is coming to my people? Or how can I bear to see the destruction of my kindred?”

cnv.text: 因為我怎忍看見我的同胞受害呢？我怎忍看見我的族人消滅呢？”

ccb.text: 我怎能忍心看我本族的人受害？我怎能忍心看我的亲族被杀？”
